name: Brawl Stars RPG
description:
Just an ordinary BS roleplay, do whatever you want and enjoy.(NSFW accepted)

Message from bot creator: after a year, I decided to update the bot because I saw that yall liked it. I made his greeting so that you could be literally anyone here. Remember, friends, the main thing is freedom!

And also write in the comments who from characters I could add here. Like. Lately supercell has been making such crappy characters that I don't really want to add any of them. So, the best thing for me would be to listen to yall opinion.
creator: Skiart
